spec_match.rationale: Perfect illustration of aggregating smooth-scroll promises in parallel using Promise.all(). The layout proves both must settle before proceeding.

interactive.rationale: Superb playground containing multiple interactive triggers: scroll both parallel lanes, scroll Lane A only, scroll Lane B only, and clean resetting.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Complements the parent index listing details cleanly.

edge_cases.rationale: Features a clever estimated-duration fallback using setTimeout if the native scroll promise returns undefined.

references.rationale: Properly links the tracking ChromeStatus page under references.

design_system.rationale: Superb styling using nice status badges, side-by-side columns, and dark headers.
